list.title: Projects
list.subtitle: Workspaces with their own instructions, files, and chats.
list.emptyBody: Use a project to hold a body of work: a series of essays, a research thread, a codebase you keep returning to. The instructions and files you add travel with every chat.

detail.instructionsHint: These travel with every chat in this project. Voice, house style, do and don't, anything you'd otherwise repeat.
detail.instructionsPlaceholder: Treat me as an editor of long-form essays…
detail.instructionsEmpty: No instructions yet. Add a few lines about how Aurelia should answer inside this project.
detail.filesHint: Uploaded to the project library and indexed for retrieval. The assistant can search these during chats in this project.
detail.filesAddDescription: Upload a PDF, Markdown or text file. Aurelia indexes it so the assistant can retrieve it during chats in this project.
detail.filesEmptyBody: Drop in working notes, a style guide, a glossary, anything you want the assistant to keep in view.
detail.filesAddFailed: Some files could not be added
detail.chatsEmptyBody: Start one below. Every reply will lean on the instructions and files above.
detail.editDescription: Update the name, description, accent, or marker.
detail.editAutoAddHint: Files you upload inside this project's chats are also added to the project library.
detail.deleteBody: The project, its instructions, and its files will be removed. Chats started inside it will move back to your regular history.
detail.notFoundBody: It may have been deleted, or the link is wrong.

create.title: New project
create.description: A project bundles instructions, files, and the chats that lean on them.
create.descPlaceholder: A line so future-you remembers what this is.
create.instructionsPlaceholder: Treat me as an editor of long-form essays…
create.nameExists: A project with this name already exists.
